nasb.text: Hezekiah prayed before the Lord and said, “O Lord, the God of Israel, who are enthroned above the cherubim, You are the God, You alone, of all the kingdoms of the earth. You have made heaven and earth.

esv.text: And Hezekiah prayed before the Lord and said: “O Lord, the God of Israel, enthroned above the cherubim, you are the God, you alone, of all the kingdoms of the earth; you have made heaven and earth.

cnv.text: 希西家在耶和華面前禱告，說：“耶和華以色列的　神，坐在二基路伯中間的啊，只有你是地上萬國的　神，天地是你創造的。

ccb.text: 祷告说：“坐在二基路伯天使之上、以色列的上帝耶和华啊，唯有你是天下万国的上帝，你创造了天地。
